one_line: Built a clean public-facing JSON-driven static leaderboard (leaderboard.html + leaderboard.json) rendering a models-vs-pass@k table with real A1 (REx 0.897/zero_shot 0.230, glm-5p2, n=126), A2 (REx 0.893, deepseek-v4-pro, n=150) and E3 (OpenSRE-GRPO 0.107 vs base-8B 0.071, n=28; Fireball arm shown blocked, not fabricated) numbers; verify_leaderboard.py serves the dir over HTTP and confirms the page loads the JSON, 29/29 checks pass; no shared-core edits.
